title: eriogonum cinereum
intro: Eriogonum cinereum, also known as the coastal buckwheat or gray buckwheat, is a perennial shrub native to the coastal regions of California in the United States. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Eriogonum cinereum include its ability to support the immune system, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. The plant is typically prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil for herbal use, and is also used in skincare products due to its antioxidant and moisturizing properties.
